    A

    add(String) - Method in class ShoppingCart
     

    B

    BST - Class in Unnamed Package
    A Binary Search Tree (BST) storing Product objects ordered by price.
    BST() - Constructor for class BST
    Creates an empty BST.

    D

    display() - Method in class ShoppingCart
     

    E

    equals(Object) - Method in class Product
    Determines whether two Product objects are equal by comparing their IDs.

    F

    FileProcessor - Class in Unnamed Package
    Utility class for reading product data from a CSV file.
    FileProcessor() - Constructor for class FileProcessor
     
    findMax() - Method in class BST
    Returns the product with the maximum price in the entire BST.
    findMax(BST.BSTNode) - Method in class BST
    Finds the node with the maximum price in a subtree.
    findMin() - Method in class BST
    Returns the product with the minimum price in the entire BST.
    findMin(BST.BSTNode) - Method in class BST
    Finds the node with the minimum price in a subtree.

    getCart() - Method in class ShoppingCart
     
    getCategory() - Method in class Product
     
    getID() - Method in class Product
     
    getName() - Method in class Product
     
    getPrice() - Method in class Product
     
    getProduct(String) - Method in class HashTable
    Retrieves a product by ID using linear probing.
    getProductsInRange(double, double) - Method in class BST
    Returns all products whose prices fall within a given range.
    getStock() - Method in class Product
     
    getTags() - Method in class Product
     

    H

    hashCode() - Method in class Product
    Generates a hash code based on the product ID.
    HashTable - Class in Unnamed Package
    A hash table implementation that stores Product objects using open addressing with linear probing.
    HashTable() - Constructor for class HashTable
    Default constructor initializing the table with a capacity of 11.
    HashTable(int) - Constructor for class HashTable
    Creates a hash table with the given initial capacity.

    I

    inorderTraversal() - Method in class BST
    Prints the BST contents in ascending price order.
    insert(Product) - Method in class BST
    Inserts a product into the BST based on its price.
    insert(Product) - Method in class HashTable
    Inserts a product into the hash table.
    intValidation() - Static method in class ProductManager
    Reads and validates an integer from user input.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class ProductManager
    Application entry point.

    P

    Product - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents a product in the inventory system.
    Product(String, String, double, String, int, Set<String>) - Constructor for class Product
    Constructs a new Product with all fields initialized.
    ProductManager - Class in Unnamed Package
    Main driver class for the product management system.
    ProductManager() - Constructor for class ProductManager
     

    R

    readUsersFile(String) - Static method in class FileProcessor
    Reads a CSV file and converts each line into a Product object.
    remove(String) - Method in class HashTable
    Removes a product from the hash table by ID.
    remove(String) - Method in class ShoppingCart
     
    remove(Product) - Method in class BST
    Removes a specific product from the BST (matches by price and ID).
    resize() - Method in class HashTable
    Doubles the hash table size (plus 1) and rehashes all elements.
    root - Variable in class BST
     

    S

    search(double) - Method in class BST
    Searches for a product with the given price.
    search(String) - Method in class ShoppingCart
     
    setCategory(String) - Method in class Product
    Sets the product category.
    setID(String) - Method in class Product
    Sets the product ID.
    setName(String) - Method in class Product
    Sets the product name.
    setPrice(double) - Method in class Product
    Sets the product price.
    setStock(int) - Method in class Product
    Sets the product's stock quantity.
    setTags(Set<String>) - Method in class Product
    Sets the tags associated with the product.
